description: Inside the Lighthouse, Coulson and May are interrogated by General Stoner about their sabotage of Project Insight. As the lockdown initiates and the anti-aircraft system targets the Zephyr, Coulson deduces that the Chronicoms have compromised the base systems. Stoner is skeptical of their story, but the rising chaos signals increasing Chronicom control.

transcript.line: All signals are quiet, even with the Quinjet docking.
Well, keep scanning, and re-engage cloaking. Glad to see you. Where's Malick?
It's complicated. We went there. He was waiting for us...
He's dead. I shot him.
That wasn't the order, Agent Shaw.
Yeah, but he kept making waves. I thought it was best to...
Damn it, that wasn't the order! I don't have time to deal with you right now. We need to get moving. You got a 20 on Daisy and Sousa?
I checked every camera feed in the Lighthouse. No sign of them.
I can't be out my strongest fighter. Deke, stay put. I want every scanner on this ship searching...
But I know the Lighthouse. Your parents could be...
Running out of time. There's no debate on this. I blew up the one reason those Chronicoms had to keep them alive. I need to get in there now.
There's another reason... It's a trap.
I don't have a choice.
Which is why I'm coming with you. And there's no debate on that. I'll start pre-flight.
Simmons, scan for Daisy and Sousa, and while you're at it, scan for the enemy ship. We gave up our position. That may cause them to give up theirs.
Yes, Director.
Let's bring the pain to them for once.
The launch silo's our only chance of getting in before they lock down the base. It's bad enough we don't have a plan, now there's probably no way out.
We're good under pressure.
Today's the Bicentennial. My parents threw a picnic at the lake. Whole family. Rocket pops and raising hell with my cousins. It's not supposed to be like this.
The Chronicoms are trying to get into your head, Mack.
This isn't exactly how I'd imagined you'd meet my parents.
But what a first impression, huh?
Welcome to the Lighthouse. We have enacted Lockdown Protocol. All movement is prohibited.
Who initiated Lockdown? It wasn't my order. And today of all days, all orders come from me.
They're using the lockdown to divide and conquer the base.
I didn't bring you here to speak.
Lighthouse anti-aircraft batteries have locked onto the bogey, sir.
I haven't ordered that yet.
The missiles have begun their arming sequence. The system is running on its own.
Anything computerized has been hijacked.
Agent, do not fire on that ship until I tell you to! Go downstairs and rip out the mainframe if you have to.
You're too late.
Sir... missiles are away.
Incoming!
Three missiles inbound!
Prepare yourselves for extreme G's!
